specification.body: All assigned command messages in command_unit_list
If user want to know the status

packagedElement.name: Get position of the person & approach the person

ownedElement.text: Get position of the person & approach the person

properties.name: RoIS
properties.documentation:
1. Scope This specification defines a framework that can handle messages and data exchanged between human-robot interaction service components and service applications. It includes a platform-independent model (PIM) of the framework. The new 3-layered structure of RoIS 2.0 should be described here.
  • Definition of the functional components using RoSO and RoIS ontologies.
  • The lower surface of the messaging layer is to be removed from the messaging section and PSMs.
  • Add a functional component that provides streaming functions for cybernetic avatar services.

properties.name: Example of robot scenario for robotic reception service
Interfaces
properties.documentation: 8.2.3 Interfaces The overall configuration of the interfaces in the RoIS Framework is shown in Figure 8.10.
